data.title: StepChange Director Geoff Lewis Increases Shareholding via On-Market Purchases
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

StepChange Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:STH) ) has shared an announcement.

StepChange Holdings director Geoff Lewis has increased his direct holding in the company through on-market purchases made on 24 and 26 March 2026. He acquired 165,000 ordinary fully paid shares for $18,775, lifting his freely tradeable stake while his larger escrowed holding of 23,712,000 shares remains unchanged.

Following the transactions, Lewis now holds 2,665,000 non-escrowed ordinary shares in addition to his escrowed block, reinforcing his financial exposure to the company’s equity. The trades were conducted outside a closed period and did not involve any disposals, signaling continued confidence from a key insider without altering existing lock-up arrangements.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:STH) stock is a Buy with a A$0.23 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on StepChange Holdings Ltd. stock, see the AU:STH Stock Forecast page.

More about StepChange Holdings Ltd.

StepChange Holdings Ltd. is a listed company on the ASX, where it has issued ordinary fully paid shares. The company’s securities structure includes a large block of shares under voluntary escrow, indicating a focus on controlled liquidity and alignment between insiders and broader shareholders.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Solis Minerals Ltd Registered Shs ( (AU:SLM) ) has shared an announcement.

Solis Minerals Limited has scheduled its Annual General Meeting for 28 May 2026 in West Leederville, Western Australia, where shareholders will, among other business, consider the election of a director under relevant listing rules. The company has set 8 April 2026 as the closing date for written nominations for the board position and will circulate a detailed notice of meeting to shareholders and publish it on the ASX platform and its website in due course.

data.title: NZX to launch S&P/NZX 20 index futures in April to deepen local equity market
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from NZX ( (NZSTF) ).

NZX will launch S&P/NZX 20 Index Futures on 28 April 2026, giving investors a local, low-cost tool to hedge or gain exposure to the New Zealand equity market and aligning the country with other developed markets that have liquid index futures. Backed by a Cornerstone Group of major institutional investors and a designated market maker in BNP Paribas, the contracts are designed to boost liquidity in NZX-listed stocks, support KiwiSaver and institutional portfolio management, and lay the groundwork for a broader domestic equity derivatives platform.

The exchange has upgraded its trading, clearing and connectivity infrastructure and secured connectivity via Trading Technologies, enabling both global and domestic participants to access the new futures. By setting the contract size at $1 per index point and planning for retail broker and platform integration over time, NZX aims to expand participation across the market, deepen on-market activity and restore a local futures capability that had previously migrated offshore.

More about NZX

NZX is New Zealand’s primary securities exchange, operating the country’s equity, debt, funds, derivatives and energy markets while providing trading, clearing, settlement, depository and data services. The group also owns ETF issuer Smart, KiwiSaver provider SuperLife, and fund manager QuayStreet Asset Management, and delivers platform technology through NZX Wealth Technologies for local investment advisers and providers.

See more insights into NZSTF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Keybridge Capital Limited ( (AU:KBC) ) has provided an announcement.

Keybridge Capital Limited has strengthened its board with the appointment of Andrew Moffat as a non-executive director, marking the return of a former chairman who previously served on the board between 2014 and 2016. Moffat brings more than 25 years of corporate and investment banking experience, including senior roles in equity capital markets and advisory, and currently holds multiple non-executive directorships across listed and unlisted entities.

The company’s directors say Moffat’s expertise will be invaluable as Keybridge pursues a rebuilding phase, signaling a renewed focus on governance and strategic repositioning for its diversified investment portfolio. His appointment may bolster investor confidence by reinforcing board depth and oversight at a time when the group is seeking to stabilise and enhance the performance of its varied holdings.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:KBC) stock is a Hold with a A$0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Keybridge Capital Limited stock, see the AU:KBC Stock Forecast page.

More about Keybridge Capital Limited

Keybridge Capital Limited is an Australian investment and financial services group listed on the ASX. It manages a diversified portfolio of listed and unlisted investments and loan assets across life insurance in New Zealand, property, and funds management, and holds substantial stakes in companies including Yowie Group, Benjamin Hornigold, HHY Fund, Molopo Energy, and RNY Property Trust.

data.title: ISB Corporation Issues Restricted Stock to Align Management Pay With Shareholder Value
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ISB CORP (Japan) ( (JP:9702) ) just unveiled an update.

ISB Corporation has approved the issuance of 15,356 new shares of common stock as restricted stock remuneration to six directors and nine executive officers, with a total value of ¥31,571,936 and a payment date set for April 27, 2026. The shares will be allocated through monetary compensation claims converted in kind, at an issue price of ¥2,056 per share, matching the prior day’s Tokyo Stock Exchange closing price to ensure alignment with market value and avoid preferential treatment.

The move is part of a restricted share-based remuneration plan first introduced in 2020 to incentivize eligible directors and executive officers to enhance long-term corporate value and strengthen alignment with shareholders. By tying a portion of management compensation to company stock under restricted conditions, ISB aims to reinforce value sharing with investors and support sustained performance and governance objectives without materially advantaging insiders over the broader market.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9702) stock is a Hold with a Yen2232.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ISB CORP (Japan) stock, see the JP:9702 Stock Forecast page.

More about ISB CORP (Japan)

ISB Corporation is a Japan-based company listed under securities code 9702, operating in the information services and systems sector. The company focuses on providing technology-driven solutions and corporate services, with a governance structure that includes a board of directors, executive officers, and audit and supervisory committee members as part of its management and oversight framework.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Summerset Group Holdings Limited ( (DE:20S) ) has issued an update.

Harbour Asset Management Limited has increased its substantial shareholding in Summerset Group Holdings, lifting its stake from 7.551% to 8.597% of the retirement village operator’s ordinary shares. The move reflects continued institutional interest in Summerset, with Harbour’s position now representing 20,984,507 shares out of 244,092,099 on issue.

The change in holding results from a series of on-market buy and sell trades since May 2025, including gross purchase consideration of more than $75 million across Harbour and its subsidiary BNZ Investment Services. The higher stake consolidates Harbour’s role as a key institutional shareholder, potentially giving it greater influence over governance matters and signalling confidence in Summerset’s long-term prospects to the market.

More about Summerset Group Holdings Limited

Summerset Group Holdings Limited is a New Zealand-based retirement village operator focused on providing aged care and independent living options. The company develops, owns, and manages retirement villages and care facilities, targeting the growing demand for senior living solutions in the New Zealand market.

data.title: Tribeca Global Natural Resources posts indicative late-March NTA update
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TGF) ) has shared an announcement.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. has released an indicative estimate of its net tangible asset backing per ordinary share as at 27 March 2026, reporting a pre-tax NTA of $3.29 and a post-tax NTA of $3.00 on an ex-dividend basis. The figures are calculated over 73,693,826 shares on issue and are net of all fees and expenses.

The company stressed that these NTA numbers are based primarily on previously reported monthly data and estimated performance of listed equity holdings, while private credit and other unlisted investments are not revalued weekly and will only be fully reflected in the official monthly NTA statement. As a result, the release offers investors a provisional snapshot rather than a complete view of portfolio performance, underscoring the inherent estimation risk and the need to await month-end audited figures for a more definitive assessment.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TGF) stock is a Hold with a A$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. stock, see the AU:TGF Stock Forecast page.

More about Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd.

Tribeca Global Natural Resources Ltd. is an Australia-listed investment company focused on global natural resources, investing across equities, private credit and other unlisted assets in the resources sector. Its portfolio is managed by Tribeca Global Resources Pty Ltd, part of Tribeca Investment Partners, with a strategy that blends listed securities and alternative assets for diversified exposure.

Chilwa Minerals Ltd ( (AU:CHW) ) has issued an announcement.

Chilwa Minerals Limited has disclosed a change in the holdings of director Alexander Shaw, who increased his direct stake in the company through an on-market purchase. The transaction, which did not occur during a closed trading period, suggests routine portfolio adjustment rather than an exceptional trading event. data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bendigo & Adelaide Bank ( (AU:BEN) ) just unveiled an update.

Bendigo and Adelaide Bank Limited has applied for quotation on the ASX of 11,799,036 new fully paid ordinary shares under its dividend or distribution plan, with an issue date of March 31, 2026. The additional shares will expand the bank’s listed equity base and reflect ongoing use of equity-based distribution mechanisms, which may slightly dilute existing holdings while supporting capital management objectives.

The application formalizes the admission of these securities to trading under the existing BEN ticker, ensuring the new shares are fully fungible with the bank’s current ordinary stock. This step maintains transparency for investors regarding changes in the bank’s share capital and facilitates orderly trading of the newly issued securities on the ASX.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:BEN) stock is a Hold with a A$10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bendigo & Adelaide Bank stock, see the AU:BEN Stock Forecast page.
